description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Linting that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: iwyu and format. The iwyu job runs on an ubuntu-latest container with Debian Sid image, installing dependencies, checking out the repository and submodules, configuring and building with CMake, and checking the build output with IWYU. The format job runs on ubuntu-20.04, checks out the repository, installs clang-format-11, and runs it on source files, checking for changes.
